_comment: Python mlx-vlm 0.4.3 reference output (temperature=0, deterministic) for each canonical test image. Generated 2026-04-25 with Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit. The strict gate asserts Swift output is within 2px on every edge of every panel against these numbers. Refresh whenever mlx-vlm or model snapshot changes — and update the gate immediately.
prompt:
Detect these two UI panels and output their bbox_2d coordinates as a JSON array:
1. "question" - the problem description panel on the left
2. "editor" - the code editor panel on the right
